CREATE TABLE test_directory (id INT, path VARCHAR(255));
SELECT path FROM test_directory WHERE path LIKE 'a/%';
SELECT * FROM test_directory WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_directory WHERE path = 'a/b');
INSERT INTO test_directory (id, path) VALUES (5, NULL);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_directory WHERE path IS NULL;
SELECT DISTINCT path FROM test_directory WHERE path LIKE 'a/b/%' AND id > 0;
EXECUTE FUNCTION file_mkpath((SELECT CONCAT(path, '/newdir') FROM test_directory WHERE id = 1));
EXECUTE FUNCTION file_mkpath(CONCAT('prefix/', (SELECT path FROM test_directory WHERE id = 2)));
